title: WindowUpdate
description: Active window and workspace state. Delta model — only changed fields are sent after the initial snapshot. All fields may be null on Wayland where window detection is unavailable.

app_name.description: Name of the application owning the active window; null on Wayland or when unavailable

window_title.description: Title of the active window; null on Wayland or when unavailable

workspace_name.description: Name of the current virtual workspace/desktop; null when unavailable

workspace_num.description: Index of the current virtual workspace (typically 1-based); null when unavailable
